disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Widespread itchy welts and hives appeared a few hours after eating steak at dinner
trigger_question_examples: What are you noticing on your skin?
When did the hives start and what were you doing before?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I'm covered in itchy raised welts across my chest, stomach and arms. They came up a few hours after I had steak for dinner.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Severe generalised abdominal cramping with waves of nausea
trigger_question_examples: Tell me about the stomach pain — how bad is it and where?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My whole belly is cramping badly and I keep feeling sick and nauseous. It won't settle.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Light-headedness and near-fainting on standing, with a sense of the heart racing
trigger_question_examples: Do you feel faint, dizzy or like you might pass out?
Does it get worse when you stand up? Is your heart racing?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah — every time I stand up I go really dizzy like I'm going to pass out, and my heart feels like it's pounding.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: The symptoms began roughly four to five hours after eating mammalian (red) meat, not immediately
trigger_question_examples: Exactly how long after dinner did this start?
What did you eat, and how many hours before the symptoms?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Dinner was steak, and this all kicked off maybe four or five hours later — I'd actually gone to bed and woke up like this.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Currently denies any throat tightness, difficulty breathing or difficulty swallowing
trigger_question_examples: Is your throat feeling tight or is it hard to breathe or swallow?
Any swelling of your lips, tongue or throat?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my throat feels okay and I can breathe alright — it's mainly the hives, the cramps and feeling faint.
disclosure_items.patient_deflection_template: I don't think my throat's involved... but honestly I feel so awful I'm not sure.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No adrenaline autoinjector or any allergy medication is available at home
trigger_question_examples: Do you have an EpiPen or any adrenaline autoinjector at home?
Do you have any allergy medicines there?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, we don't have anything like that here — I've never needed one before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Spends a lot of time outdoors in bushland and has had tick bites in recent months
trigger_question_examples: Do you spend much time outdoors or in the bush?
Have you had any insect or tick bites recently?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yeah, I'm outside in the bush a lot and I've pulled a couple of ticks off myself over the last few months.
